question: What migration strategy minimizes downtime when moving from SQL Server to Aurora PostgreSQL?
answer: Use AWS DMS with ongoing replication
explanation: AWS DMS with ongoing CDC replication enables near-zero downtime. CSV export and full-load DMS both require application downtime. Cross-Region read replicas only work between same-engine databases.

options.text: Use AWS DMS with ongoing replication
Export database as CSV and import
Use AWS DMS in full-load mode
